message:
🌱 Add argo-rollouts: Traefik Support mission (#1124)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "argo-rollouts-516-traefik-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "argo-rollouts: Traefik Support",
+    "description": "Traefik Support. Requested by 58+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current argo-rollouts deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your argo-rollouts version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nhelm list -n argo-rollouts 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working argo-rollouts installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review argo-rollouts configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant argo-rollouts configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get configmap -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=argo-rollouts\n```\nIn addition to the current controllers, it would be great to support Traefik!\n\nThe [TraefikService](https://docs.traefik.io/routing/providers/kubernetes-crd/#kind-traefikservice) object supports the ability for weighted round robin load balancing"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Traefik Support",
+        "description": "It seems that Traefik will have an implementation for the Kubernetes Gateway API https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/implementations/#traefik\n\nSo Traefik support might be available after implementing https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/1438\n```yaml\n$ kubectl apply -f nginx-rollout.yaml -n argo-demo\nerror: error validating \"nginx-rollout.yaml\": error validating data: ValidationError(Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting): unknown field \"traefik\" in io.argoproj.v1alpha1.Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting; if you choose to ignore these errors, turn validation off with --validate=false\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n argo-rollouts -l app.kubernetes.io/name=argo-rollouts\nkubectl get events -n argo-rollouts --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Traefik Support\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "It seems that Traefik will have an implementation for the Kubernetes Gateway API https://gateway-api.sigs.k8s.io/implementations/#traefik\n\nSo Traefik support might be available after implementing https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/1438",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ kubectl apply -f nginx-rollout.yaml -n argo-demo\nerror: error validating \"nginx-rollout.yaml\": error validating data: ValidationError(Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting): unknown field \"traefik\" in io.argoproj.v1alpha1.Rollout.spec.strategy.canary.trafficRouting; if you choose to ignore these errors, turn validation off with --validate=false"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "argo-rollouts",
+      "graduated",
+      "app-definition",
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "argo-rollouts"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress",
+      "Service"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "feature"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/issues/516",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/argoproj/argo-rollouts/pull/1907"
+    },
+    "reactions": 58,
+    "comments": 7,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with argo-rollouts installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:22:55.750Z",
+    "scannerVersion": "cncf-gen-3.0.0",
+    "sanitized": true,
+    "findings": []
+  }
+}
